title: taraxacum hemicyclum
intro: Taraxacum hemicyclum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion genus in the sunflower family Asteraceae. The leaves and roots of Taraxacum hemicyclum have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. This plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Taraxacum hemicyclum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots and leaves can also be dried and used as a dietary supplement.
